title: jasminum obtusifolium
intro: Jasminum obtusifolium, also known as the star jasmine or Indian star jasmine, is a climbing shrub native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Jasminum obtusifolium include its ability to improve sleep quality, reduce stress and anxiety, and even lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
